Welcome to

Glamluxxe
Travel Squad

Welcome to Glamluxxe Travel — a luxury travel community for women who love unforgettable experiences, genuine connections, and stress-free group trips.

From luxury villas to curated adventures around the world, we create trips that are fun, elevated, and unforgettable. Whether you are looking for a solo adventure with new friends or planning the ultimate girls' trip, Glamluxxe is your squad.

With RL Luxury Travel, every detail is handled — flights, hotels, excursions, transfers, and more. You just show up and glow.

✦ Featured Group Trip ✦

The Ultimate Co-Ed Trip to
Zanzibar

Juneteenth Celebration 🎉

Zanzibar,
Tanzania

📅 June 17 – 24, 2026

Celebrate Juneteenth in one of Africa's most breathtaking destinations — the island paradise of Zanzibar! This co-ed luxury group trip blends culture, beach, nightlife, and an authentic African experience you will never forget.

4 nights at B2Z Juneteenth host hotel
3 nights at 4/5 star resort
Roundtrip airport transportation
Ground transportation to all events
Daily breakfast included
Welcome dinner
Farewell dinner
B2Z Juneteenth Met Gala dinner
B2Z private boat experience
Beach club party finale
Salam Cave — swim with turtles!
Stone Town cultural tour
Night market experience
Welcome gift
Pricing starts at
$2,599
per person  ·  flights not included
✦ $100 deposit per person secures your spot

📞 For more info text: 713-482-9582  |  🌐 www.luxurytravelwithrl.com

✦ Zanzibar Resort ✦

Luxury Room Options

Luxury Private 2 Bedroom Bungalow with Private Pool & Terrace

Maximum 3 to 4 guests. 1 king bed and 2 twin beds. Your own private pool and terrace — the ultimate group accommodation in paradise.

$2,599 pp
Quad pricing · $3,299 pp Triple
Private Bungalow — King Bed with Private Terrace

1 king bed. Ideal for couples or solo travelers seeking their own private luxury retreat with a beautiful personal terrace space.

$3,099 pp
Double occupancy · $3,399 single occupancy
Private Bungalow — 2 Twin Beds with Private Terrace

Solo traveler roommate option. 2 twin beds in a private bungalow with terrace. Enjoy your own space while connecting with fellow squad members.

$3,199 pp
Solo traveler · roommate option available

All package prices include 4 nights at the B2Z Juneteenth events host hotel in addition to the resort stay. Flights are not included.

Safari Adventure — Tanzania
Luxury Suite

Adventure Awaits

Safari in Tanzania

Come face to face with giraffes, impala, and the breathtaking wildlife of the African savannah. Our Zanzibar package includes the option to add a Tanzania safari — one of the most awe-inspiring experiences on earth.

✦ What We Offer ✦

Our Luxury Services

🌍
Group Travel

Glamluxxe group trips are curated for women who want luxury, sisterhood, and unforgettable adventures. All-inclusive coordination, flexible payment plans, and VIP treatment throughout.

💍
Destination Weddings

Dream destination ceremonies on pristine beaches, clifftop villas, and world-renowned resort venues. We handle every detail from venue selection to the honeymoon.

🥂
Honeymoons

Romantic escapes designed entirely for two. Private villas, couples spa packages, sunset dinners, and overwater bungalows. Begin forever in paradise.

🛳️
Luxury Cruises

Caribbean, Mediterranean, Alaska, and beyond. Premium cabin selections, exclusive shore excursions, and special group booking perks through top cruise lines.

🏝️
All-Inclusive Resorts

Sandals, Secrets, Hyatt, Palace Resorts, and more. Premium all-inclusive packages with VIP upgrades, butler service, and exclusive club-level access.

✈️
Custom Itineraries

Your dream trip built from scratch. Flights, hotels, excursions, dining, and transfers — every single detail personally curated just for you.

Travel Protected

Travel Insurance —
Do Not Leave
Without It

Every trip we book comes with our strong recommendation to protect your investment. Life happens — and your travel experience should always be covered.

  • Trip cancellation and interruption coverage
  • Emergency medical and evacuation
  • Lost, stolen, or delayed baggage
  • Travel delay reimbursement
  • 24/7 travel assistance hotline
  • Cancel for any reason options available
